name: Risotto with Lamb and Fennel
recipeIngredient: 1 medium size fennel, diced and blanched
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil. Season the lamb with salt and pepper and sear on all sides. Reduce heat and cook until rare. Dice the cooked lamb and set aside.
2. In a saucepan, bring broth to a gentle boil.
3. In a medium saucepan, saute the shallot in 1 tablespoon of olive oil until transparent. Add the rice and stir to coat with oil. When it is lightly toasted but not brown, pour in 2 cups of boiling broth. Stir constantly, making sure to scrape the bottom of the pan. Add broth when necessary, always keeping the risotto slightly liquid, and not allowing it to dry out. Cook for about 15 minutes, until firm but not raw inside.
4. Add the blanched fennel, fennel seeds, and diced lamb, stir to combine and cook another 2 minutes.
5. Remove from the heat, add the Parmigiano and butter, and let sit for one minute. Stir thoroughly and serve immediately.
Yield: 6 to 8 first course servings
